concepts.definition: Language invoking deception, disguise, misleading appearances, or deliberate pretense.

concepts.concept_name: expressions of commitment to collaboration and community responsibility
concepts.definition: Language expressing commitment to shared work, community membership, mutual support, or collective responsibility.

concepts.concept_name: references to power dynamics and political figures
concepts.definition: Language referring to political actors, authority, influence, control, or relationships of power.

concepts.concept_name: questions and statements challenging beliefs or assumptions
concepts.definition: Language that questions, disputes, or prompts reconsideration of a belief or assumption.

concepts.concept_name: expressions related to admiration and respect for individuals
concepts.definition: Language expressing admiration, esteem, honor, or respect toward a person.

concepts.concept_name: expressions of vulnerability and honesty about personal struggles
concepts.definition: Language candidly revealing vulnerability, difficulty, or an ongoing personal struggle.

concepts.concept_name: concepts and discussions related to creativity and innovation
concepts.definition: Language concerning imagination, creative work, invention, novelty, or innovation.
